---
title: "Kodjo Aklobessi"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:kodjo.aklobessi@umontreal.ca
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/kaklobessi
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kaklobessi
---

I am a PhD candidate in Economics at the **Université de Montréal**. My research lies at the intersection of Family Macroeconomics, Labor economics, and Applied microeconomics.

My work focuses on ...

---

### Research Interests
